title: A - Z JAMB's use of English
JAMB Series Remix: Past Questions & Answers on Biology.
description:
This essential guide for JAMB candidates provides a comprehensive collection of past questions and answers on Biology, ranging from 1978 to the present. Compiled by Sam O. Adedara, the book is designed to help students prepare effectively for the exam with confidence. It offers a clear, focused approach to mastering Biology, ensuring a thorough understanding of key concepts.

Satisfaction guaranteed with this revision tool!

title: Lamlad's SSCE & UTME Mathematics
description:
This comprehensive mathematics textbook is designed to help students prepare for the SSCE and UTME exams. It offers revision strategies, a summary of key notes, and worked examples and drills to aid understanding. With over 1,000 SSCE and UTME-style questions, along with detailed solutions, it provides an excellent resource for thorough exam preparation.

The textbook is written by J. O. Ajayi, O. Ajaja, and A. B. Fagbohun, offering the most extensive SSCE/UTME revision content available.

Copyright © Lamlad. All rights reserved.
